title: HRTF Fix
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527559966665b91493294f5d495fe462c8b67ca3.png)

# HRTF Fix

Fix [MC-265514](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-265514).  

Minecraft 1.20.2-1.21.4 vanilla code make hrtf settings invalid, this mod fix the bug.

Referred to [bytzo/mc-265514](https://github.com/bytzo/mc-265514).  

![setting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8f41a1b59bb7c908263442ca6bcf90f3e0f98ab.png)
